messages.subject: [R-SIG-Mac] Bug Report
messages.body_plain:
Deleted my old copy of R.framework and associated files and installed  
the powerpc/R-2.2.1.dmg version from http://cran.r-project.org/bin/ 
macosx/

Version from in the command line copy: Version 2.2.1  (2005-12-20  
r36812)  System is OS X 10.4.5, 12" PowerBook G4 w/ 640 MBs of RAM.

When I launch R-GUI it consistently crashes on me.  Attempting to  
remove preference files and other created files does not appear to  
affect anything.

Sincerely,
David H. Clements

Date/Time:      2006-02-28 21:08:34.409 -0700
OS Version:     10.4.5 (Build 8H14)

messages.body_snippet:
Deleted my old copy of R.framework and associated files and installed  
the powerpc/R-2.2.1.dmg version from http://cran.r-project.org/bin/ 
macosx/

Version from in the command line copy: Version 2.2
